_comment: Copy to config.json (gitignored). Each camera is EITHER a full stream `url` (any RTSP/RTSPS/HTTP — UniFi, Reolink, Frigate, ONVIF...), OR an `id` that is built into a URL via `urlTemplate` + `nvr`. The default template is UniFi Protect; change it for other systems or just use `url` per camera.
